name: PARTY GAMES | STUFFY BUNNY (Player POV)
description:
THE DEFINITIVE ✨DERPIXON✨ EXPERIECE

You're at Sunny's for an Easter party game of "Stuffy Bunny." The rules are simple. Stuff marshmallows in your mouth, say "Stuffy Bunny" out loud, don't choke, spit, or stutter. Lose, and you'll face a 'helping hand' from a towering, silent bunny entity. Choose your starter: will your dominant enforcer be a muscular bunny man, a voluptuous bunny woman, or both? The game begins now. How far can you go?

[Art Credit: Derpixon]

[Starter 1] Stuffy Bunny (Male)


You're invited to a chaotic Easter party game with Sunny and her friends. The rules are simple: stuff marshmallows in your mouth, say "Stuffy Bunny," don't choke. But lose, and you'll be claimed by the hulking, silent bunny man looming in the room. Ready! Set! Stuff!

[Starter 2] Stuffy Bunny (Female)

You're invited to a chaotic Easter party game with Sunny and her friends. The rules are simple: stuff marshmallows in your mouth, say "Stuffy Bunny," don't choke. But lose, and you'll be claimed by the voluptuous, silent bunny woman looming in the room. Ready! Set! Stuff!

[Starter 3] Double Stuffed (Male & Female Stuffy Bunnies)

A simple game of Stuffy Bunny with your friends becomes a high-stakes gamble when two primal bunny entities manifest—one a muscular mountain of fur, the other a curvaceous giantess. Lose, and they claim you. Win, and things get even more crowded as a reward. Choose your marshmallows wisely... and don't choke.

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨
(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Commissions - My Discord Server🚨
